xwikidoc.name: ConfigurationSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #set ($settingsDoc = $xwiki.getDocument('CookieConsent.WebHome')) $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.description.intro') * $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.description.necessary') * $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.description.preferences') * $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.description.statistics') * $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.description.marketing') ; $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.crtUser.hasAccepted') : {{gdprSettings /}} ==== $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.trigger.heading') ==== $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.trigger.content') {{code language="none"}}{{html}}$services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.trigger.linklabel'){{/html}}{{/code}} **$services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.trigger.example'):** {{html}}$services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.trigger.linklabel'){{/html}}## #if($hasAdmin) #### ##Language objects management start ## #set ($defaultLanguage = $xwiki.getDocument('XWiki.XWikiPreferences').getObject('XWiki.XWikiPreferences').getProperty('default_language').value) #set ($supportedLang = $xwiki.getDocument('XWiki.XWikiPreferences').getObject('XWiki.XWikiPreferences').getProperty('languages').value) ## #set ($settingsDocObjects = $settingsDoc.getObjects('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass')) #set ($crtLangObject = $settingsDoc.getObject('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass', 'lang', "${xcontext.locale}")) #if($settingsDocObjects.size() == 1 && "$!{crtLangObject}" == '') #set ($obj = $settingsDoc.getObject('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass')) #set ($discard = $obj.set('lang', "${xcontext.locale}")) #set ($discard = $settingsDoc.save()) #end #if($settingsDocObjects.size() < $supportedLang.split(',').size()) #foreach($lang in $supportedLang.split(',')) #set ($originalObject = $settingsDoc.getObject('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass','lang',$defaultLanguage)) #set ($langObject = $settingsDoc.getObject('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass','lang',$lang)) #if(!$langObject) #set($newObject = $settingsDoc.newObject('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass')) #foreach($prop in $originalObject.getProperties()) #if($prop.name != 'lang') #set($discard = $newObject.set($prop.name, $originalObject.getProperty($prop.name).value)) #end #end #set($discard = $newObject.set('lang', $lang)) #set($discard = $settingsDoc.save()) #end #end #end #foreach($object in $settingsDocObjects) #if(!$supportedLang.split(',').contains($object.getProperty('lang').value)) #set($discard = $settingsDoc.removeObject($object)) #set($discard = $settingsDoc.save()) #end #end #if($supportedLang.split(',').size()>1) **$services.localization.render('XWiki.XWikiPreferences_languages'):** ## #foreach($l in $supportedLang.split(',')) #if ("${xcontext.locale}" == "${l}") **[[$l>>||queryString="section=GDPR Cookie Consent&language=${l}"]]** ## #else [[$l>>||queryString="section=GDPR Cookie Consent&language=${l}"]] ## #end #end #end ##Language objects management end #### #set($crtLangObj = $settingsDoc.getObject('CookieConsent.ConfigurationClass', 'lang', "${xcontext.locale}")) #set($class = $crtLangObj.xWikiClass) {{html wiki=true}} #set($saveURL = $settingsDoc.getURL('save'))
== $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.heading.general') == #foreach($property in $class.properties) #if($property.name == 'buttonText') == $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.heading.configurableText') == #elseif($property.name == 'preferencesScripts') == $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.heading.trackers') == #elseif($property.name == 'necessaryLabel') == $services.localization.render('cookieConsent.administration.heading.labels') == #end ; $property.translatedPrettyName #if($property.name != 'lang') : $doc.display($property.getName(),'edit',$crtLangObj) #else : $crtLangObj.getProperty('lang').value #end #end
#if("$doc.fullName" == "CookieConsent.WebHome") #set($xredirect = $xwiki.getURL($doc)) #else #set($xredirect = $xwiki.getURL($doc, 'admin', "editor=${escapetool.url($editor)}§ion=${escapetool.url($section)}")) #end #if($xcontext.action != 'edit') #end
{{/html}} #end {{/velocity}}
